title: Pillcraft
description: A Create-centered modpack used for the Pillcraft SMP
body:
Pillcraft is a modpack developed for the **Pillcraft SMP**, a modded private Minecraft Survival Multiplayer server played by the Pillstack Discord server.
https://discord.gg/F86b7vYRFC
# Mods included
This modpack focused around the Create mod, and includes a bunch of Create add-ons, along with tons of smaller content mods to compliment the experience:
- Aquaculture 2 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
- Farmer's Delight
- Tectonic & Terralith
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Open Parties And Claims
- Minecolonies
- Umapyoi

**For legal reasons, I cannot include everything in the Modrinth version of the modpack. I strongly suggest you download the following mods too.**
- Stylecolonies https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stylecolonies
- TownTalk https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/towntalk
# World archives
With the 1.3 version of the modpack, you can visit the world archive of our first iteration of the server.
## How to play
1. Download the world archive [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/12jYaxtQ4gCcw_0HZxiEO0H4F14ukDjru/view?usp=drive_link).
2. Unzip the file, and find your `saves` folder where your worlds can be found.
3. Move the `world` directory into `saves` and rename it whatever you like.
4. It's also recommended that you overwrite the config folder of your modpack with the contents of `config` found in the world archive.
